data.std_name: Standard for the design and manufacture of gearboxes for hydraulic and electric drive systems
data.scope: This standard covers the design and manufacture of gearboxes used in hydraulic and electric drive systems. It applies to gearboxes for various applications, including construction, mining, marine, and aerospace.
key_requirements: Gearbox design and manufacture should comply with the safety and operational requirements for the intended application.
The gearbox's dimensions and load capacity should be carefully calculated to ensure proper operation under expected conditions.
The gearbox must be designed to withstand the specified loads and mechanical stresses.
query_points: Load capacity and dimensions of gearboxes
Safety and operational requirements for gearboxes
